ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight Number XYZ123
ham.body:
Dear John,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Here are the details of your upcoming flight:

• Flight Number: XYZ123
• Date & Time: 25th May 2026, 10:45 AM (Departure) / 01:20 PM (Arrival)
• Departure Airport: Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL)
• Arrival Airport: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport (BOM)
• Seat: 12A (Window)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 checked bag (23 kg) + 1 carry‑on (7 kg)

Check‑in is available from 24th May at 10:00 AM. To confirm your seat and print boarding pass, click <URL>.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, please reply to this email or call our customer service at 1800-123-456.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Income Tax Refund Verification
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We hope this message finds you well. I am writing on behalf of the Income Tax Department regarding your pending tax refund for the FY 2024-25.

Due to recent policy updates, all refund amounts exceeding INR 50,000 must be verified through a secure channel to prevent fraud. Please provide the following details within 48 hours to ensure that your refund is processed without delay:

1. PAN Number
2. Last 4 digits of your Aadhaar
3. Bank Account Number (linked to PAN)
4. IFSC code of the bank

To submit the information safely, click <URL>. The link will expire in 48 hours, so act fast to avoid any penalties or deduction of the refund amount.

Failure to comply may result in a delay of your refund or a deduction of up to 10% as per the Income Tax Rules.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Ravi Sharma
Senior Officer
Income Tax Department
Contact: +91-22-1234-5678
